name: chart-radar-label-custom
visual_summary: A customizable chart radar label that highlights key metrics or KPIs. Use this in a dashboard or analytics page to visually show performance data. It is useful when you need to display multiple metrics in a concise and easy-to-read manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready component component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radar-label-custom
Description: A customizable chart radar label that highlights key metrics or KPIs. Use this in a dashboard or analytics page to visually show performance data. It is useful when you need to display multiple metrics in a concise and easy-to-read manner.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. dynamic, responsive
Tags: chart, radar, label, customizable, dashboard, analytics

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
